mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler Base-service SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler Base-service SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler Base-service SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Base-service SIG maintains 533 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/Base-service.
